localities.name: Logan Square
localities.description: Hip, artsy neighborhood known for the Monument, cocktail bars, and historic boulevards.

localities.name: Wicker Park
localities.description: A hub for music, nightlife, and boutique shopping anchored by the Six Corners intersection.

localities.name: West Loop
localities.description: Former industrial packing district turned culinary capital with 'Restaurant Row' on Randolph Street.

localities.name: Lakeview
localities.description: Lively lakeside area home to Wrigley Field, Boystown, and extensive park space.

localities.name: Hyde Park
localities.description: Historic south side home to the University of Chicago and the Museum of Science and Industry.

localities.name: Avondale
localities.description: A low-key residential pocket often cited as one of the 'coolest' neighborhoods in the world.

localities.name: Lincoln Park
localities.description: Upscale area with its namesake park, zoo, and luxury brownstones.

localities.name: Pilsen
localities.description: A vibrant center for Mexican culture, murals, and the National Museum of Mexican Art.

localities.name: Uptown
localities.description: Entertainment district famous for the Aragon Ballroom, Riviera Theatre, and jazz history.

localities.name: Edgewater
localities.description: Lakeside residential neighborhood known for high-rises and the Andersonville district nearby.

localities.name: Rogers Park
localities.description: Diverse lakeside community on the far north side with beach access and artistic roots.

localities.name: Bucktown
localities.description: Chic residential area adjacent to Wicker Park known for high-end dining and converted lofts.

localities.name: South Loop
localities.description: Fast-growing high-rise district close to Grant Park and Museum Campus.

localities.name: Bridgeport
localities.description: Working-class history meets an emerging arts scene; home to the White Sox.

localities.name: Albany Park
localities.description: One of the most ethnically diverse neighborhoods in the US with incredible food options.
